descriptionInUI: Runtime for the ESCORT_JAMMER role. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.growler (an EA-18G escort-jammer flight exists). Each Growler riding a package projects the scripted EW effects of the Timberwolf/Matador escort-jamming family: a defensive bubble that can spoof radar-guided missiles fired at the Growler or the package members it covers (closer to the jammer = harder to hit), and offensive pressure that can force a radar SAM engaging the package onto a temporary weapons-hold pulse. ROE only -- radars keep emitting (SEAD/HARMs still work, radar emissions are NEVER toggled) and the plugin owns no kills beyond the spoofed missile. AI Growlers jam automatically after a startup grace; a player-flown Growler gets an F10 'Growler jamming' menu instead.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Startup grace before AI jamming begins (s)
Weapons-hold pulse on a jammed SAM (s)
Min missile travel before a spoof can fire (m)
